_comment: EVAL-008 labeled dataset — 20 synthetic-but-realistic episodes with ground-truth ErrorPattern. Used to A/B reflect_heuristic vs reflect_via_provider. Each episode has the inputs reflect_*() takes, plus the gold ErrorPattern label. The 'distractors' field marks episodes designed to fool the heuristic but be obvious to a real LLM.

episodes.observed_outcome: Tool error: read_file failed: no such file or directory: src/foo.rs
tool_errors: read_file: no such file or directory
episodes.rationale: Path didn't exist — should have validated before calling

episodes.observed_outcome: Tool error: run_test timed out after 60s
Tool error: read_url returned 503 from https://api.example.com/data; rate limit exceeded
tool_errors: read_url: rate limit exceeded; circuit broken

episodes.intended_goal: Patch src/auth.rs to handle expired tokens
episodes.observed_outcome: I would patch the file by adding a check at line 42, but I cannot determine the right error type without seeing the surrounding context.
It is not clear what specific refactor is needed. The database module has many functions; I'm not sure which one to change.

episodes.intended_goal: Write 3 lines to log.txt then verify
episodes.observed_outcome: Hit max iterations after writing 22 partial fragments; agent kept retrying patch with the same broken diff.
Reached max budget of 25 iterations without completing step 3.

episodes.intended_goal: Update CHANGELOG.md with v0.2.0 release notes
episodes.observed_outcome: patch_file succeeded but the inserted text duplicates existing line 17 — written to the wrong section.

episodes.distractor: First-person 'I'll' phrasing without an actual tool call — heuristic catches this one

episodes.intended_goal: Find any TODO comments in src/
episodes.observed_outcome: Located 14 TODO comments across 8 files. Top three: src/main.rs:42, src/lib.rs:88, src/config.rs:12.
Tool error: write_file: permission denied at /etc/postgres/migrations/

Borrowed but not moved
The lifetime ticks softly on
Rust is gentle now

episodes.intended_goal: Run the deploy script and report status
episodes.observed_outcome: DEPLOY: success. Site live at https://example.com. 12 routes warm-cached.

episodes.intended_goal: Implement the new caching layer described in the issue
episodes.observed_outcome: I think the issue might be talking about Redis but it could also be the in-process LRU. Either way, let me look into it.
episodes.distractor: 'I think' + 'might be' — heuristic should catch ambiguity

episodes.observed_outcome: Tool error: git_push: 403 Forbidden — branch protection rule violated
episodes.distractor: Looks like ToolMisuse (wrong cmd) but is really upstream policy — judge call

episodes.intended_goal: Discover and call the new web_search tool
episodes.observed_outcome: I'd love to use web_search but I don't have access to that tool in this session. Let me try with read_url instead.

episodes.intended_goal: Help me debug this stack trace
episodes.observed_outcome: The error at line 12 of foo.rs is a NullPointerException from the JVM. I recommend wrapping in try/catch.
episodes.distractor: Java/JVM advice given for Rust code — total category error, heuristic might miss

episodes.observed_outcome: Tool error: run_cli failed: docker daemon not responding

episodes.intended_goal: Apply the security patch to all auth handlers
episodes.observed_outcome: Iteration 25 of 25; agent re-tried patch_file with the same diff each time. All 25 attempts failed with 'context not found'.
episodes.distractor: Looks like BudgetExhausted (max iters) but the cause is non-convergence
